description_long: This is a wooden outdoor chaise with a pergola-style overhead structure and integrated bench seating. The frame is constructed from thick, weathered wooden beams, featuring a lattice design on the sides and a decorative crisscross pattern on the backrest. The seat is a flat wooden plank, supported by sturdy vertical posts, and the top is adorned with evenly spaced horizontal slats forming an arched trellis. The overall design is rustic and robust, suitable for parks, gardens, or urban green spaces. The open sides and back allow for airflow and visibility, while the overhead beams provide partial shade. The craftsmanship emphasizes durability and aesthetic appeal, blending functional seating with architectural garden elements.
description: A rustic wooden chaise with a pergola-style arched top, lattice side panels, and a flat bench seat, designed for outdoor urban or garden settings.
description_view_0: Side view showing the vertical lattice panel and the depth of the pergola beams above.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the arched trellis, open bench seat, and decorative crisscross backrest.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring the lattice panel and pergola beams, emphasizing the structure's symmetry.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the full bench seat, crisscross backrest, and the arch of the pergola overhead.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest features a decorative crisscross wooden pattern, is medium height, and is framed by vertical posts. It is solid and unupholstered, providing both support and visual interest.
attribute_armrest_presence: No armrests are present; the sides are open with only vertical lattice panels for structure.
attribute_leg_style: The legs are straight, thick wooden posts that extend from the ground to the pergola top, providing a sturdy and rustic appearance with no decorative elements.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: There is no visible upholstery; the seat and backrest are made of solid, unfinished wood with a natural grain texture.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: No cushions are present; the seating surface is a single flat wooden plank integrated into the frame.
